rooms.name: Stone Yard
rooms.description: The old test stone sits behind temporary rails while witnesses argue over who saw what and who got paid.

quest.start: The yard clerk offers you three witness marks for the sword test, and every one of them contradicts the others.
start_variants: A mason swears the stone moved before Arthur touched it.
A page says the sword chose a king, then chose silence.
A debt collector claims half the witnesses were bought before dawn.
quest.incomplete: The yard still wants clean proof, but clean proof is not how Camelot was born.
quest.complete: You file a version of the sword test that is honest about its contradictions.

rooms.name: Merlin's Counting Room
rooms.description: Wax tablets, bird bones, and royal debts sit in careful stacks. Merlin's absence feels like a person in the chair.

recruitable.name: Ledger Squire
recruitable.success: The Ledger Squire joins you and can spot a false prophecy by the ink cost.
recruitable.failure: The Ledger Squire decides your account is still too untidy.
recruitable.crit_win: The Ledger Squire joins and quietly balances one prophecy debt in your favor.
recruitable.crit_lose: The Ledger Squire closes the book on you for now, citing emotional arithmetic.

rooms.name: Scabbard Vault
rooms.description: An empty mount marks where a better treasure than a blade once rested. The guards talk about steel and ignore the wound.

east.locked_text: The vault wall shows a shore only when a true map scrap is held against the empty mount.

item.name: Avalon Map Scrap
item.description: a damp scrap that draws roads only after someone admits what they lost

rooms.name: Round Table Threshold
rooms.description: The hall door is open, but every seat beyond it already has a rumor standing behind it.

encounter.name: Seat Claimant
encounter.win: The claimant backs down and admits the table makes brothers out of rivals only on its best days.
encounter.lose: The claimant wins the room and leaves you carrying a rumor with teeth.
encounter.crit_win: You settle the claim so cleanly that two rival witnesses repeat the same version for once.
encounter.crit_lose: The claimant turns your answer into a public boast, and the room enjoys it too much.

rooms.name: Grail Choir
rooms.description: No cup is visible, but the walls sing like a question that only wounded kings and hungry knights can hear.

rooms.name: Mordred's Writ Room
rooms.description: A quiet clerk copies rival claims to the crown. Each version looks legal if read by bad candlelight.

rooms.name: Avalon Shore
rooms.description: The shore refuses to decide whether it is a place, a mercy, or a delay. Boats wait with no oars showing.

rooms.name: Tintagel Sea Crypt
rooms.description: Salt water knocks beneath a sealed birth ledger. Uther's seal, Igraine's name, and Merlin's handwriting refuse to sit in the same column.

item.name: Tintagel Seal
item.description: a cracked seal naming the night Arthur's parentage became a political weapon

rooms.name: Queen's Gallery
rooms.description: Guinevere's gallery overlooks the table without belonging to it. Every curtain has learned to keep counsel.

rooms.name: Lancelot Mews
rooms.description: Falcons, saddles, and sealed letters wait under a roof too low for clean heroism. The best knight's name arrives before he does.

recruitable.name: Mews Falconer
recruitable.success: The Mews Falconer joins you and knows which letters traveled by wing instead of courier.
recruitable.failure: The Mews Falconer smiles politely and keeps the birds facing away.
recruitable.crit_win: The Mews Falconer joins and brings a letter nobody admits was sent.
recruitable.crit_lose: The falcons scream before you ask your first question.

rooms.name: Kay's Bench
rooms.description: A hard bench beside the hall stores keys, insults, ration tallies, and the oldest version of court discipline.

encounter.name: Sharp-Tongued Steward
encounter.win: You survive the steward's audit and learn why Kay's office keeps the court from eating itself.
encounter.lose: The steward files you under decorative trouble and assigns you dish duty.
encounter.crit_win: You answer the audit so well the steward lends you Kay's spare key.
encounter.crit_lose: The steward finds three contradictions in your posture alone.

rooms.name: Bedivere Bank
rooms.description: A riverbank keeps practicing the sound a sword makes when nobody can bear to throw it away.
